title: crotalaria humifusa
intro: Crotalaria humifusa, also known as creeping rattlebox, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria humifusa include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
